scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawn } = require('child_process'); const procs = [ ['npm.cmd', ['run', 'dev'], { cwd: 'VNCultureBridgeAI/backend' }], ['npm.cmd', ['run', 'dev'], { cwd: 'VNCultureBridgeAI/frontend' }] ]; procs.forEach(([cmd, args, opts]) => { const child = spawn(cmd, args, { ...opts, stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); child.on('exit', code => { if (code && code !== 0) process.exitCode = code; }); });"
